groups.description: 💰 Coins, daily, gambling, stash, invest, prestige
🎮 Baro, cycles, alerts, builds, and clan info
🛡️ Purge, snipe, schedule, raid shield, and core moderation
📋 Help, about, setup, profiles, and server tools
🔧 Coinflip and utilities
👥 Events, tickets, suggestions, applications, and community features
🎵 Play, pause, skip, and manage music in voice channels
📝 Update log and version management
🎁 Create, manage, and enter giveaways
💼 Trading post, prices, and Warframe market lookup
🎙️ Temp voice channel tools (transfer, presets)
🤖 Auto-moderation (spam, caps, links, mentions)
🛑 Warnings, templates, and moderator notes
🎭 Reaction roles, level roles, role menus, mass assign
🗄️ Server admin: retention, incidents, KPIs, applications, data export
🐾 Pet shop, care, battles, evolutions, and marketplace
🛒 Browse and buy server shop items
✨ XP check, leaderboard, settings, and events
🔔 Warframe alerts — /wfnotify configure (recommended) or per-type commands
🤝 Warframe LFG: post and browse looking-for-group ads
📅 Server events: create, browse, and recurring schedules
🔧 Staff utilities: sync, analytics, webhooks, mentorship (mods)
Lock and unlock channels
